title: Extra Achievements
description: A mod that adds extra achievements to Minecraft that should be added.
body:
### Adds over **20+** New **Achievements** that should be **added** to minecraft

## ACHIEVEMENTS
- Home Sweet Home
- Mycelial Sanctuary
- Redstone Wizard
- Forger
- Smelter
- Grind Stone
- Cartographer
**16+ MORE**

![Items that will grant you achievements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bfed6cde330ebfaf8b2355760b8c891f6ac0f0a.png)
